title: Integrate pre-flight check improvements for kickoff command: consolidate the inline prerequisite checks in run() and plan() with a unified preflight_check function that adds resolve_timeout_command() for macOS gtimeout support, PreflightResult struct that threads timeout_cmd through to launch_local() and plan(), and detailed platform-specific install instructions. Keep existing tests intact. Reference the worktree version at .worktrees/kickoff-pre-flight-check-for-required-external-commands-e-g/crosslink/src/commands/kickoff.rs for the target implementation.
